title: Google Cloud CDN Backend Service
description: Represents a CDN-enabled backend service resource, including its CDN caching policy, backends, health checks, and protocol configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier for the resource.

description.description: An optional description of this resource.

protocol.description: The protocol this backend service uses to communicate with backends.

enableCDN.description: If true, enables Cloud CDN for the backend service.

cdnPolicy.description: Cloud CDN configuration for this backend service.

cacheMode.description: Specifies the cache setting for all responses from this backend.

defaultTtl.description: Default TTL for cached content in seconds.

maxTtl.description: Maximum allowed TTL for cached content in seconds.

clientTtl.description: Maximum TTL allowed in the Cache-Control response directive.

negativeCaching.description: Negative caching allows caching of certain non-successful responses.

signedUrlCacheMaxAgeSec.description: Maximum number of seconds the response to a signed URL request will be cached.

backends.description: The list of backends that serve this backend service.

healthChecks.description: The list of URLs to the health check resources.

creationTimestamp.description: Creation timestamp in RFC3339 text format.
